metaDescription: Explore all public property listings on MyHome24App with search, filters and a professional overview.
title: All Listings
description: Browse all published property listings on MyHome24App. Use search and filters to find matching homes more quickly.

filters.title: Filters & Search
filters.subtitle: Refine the results by title, city, type and price.

states.loadingText: Please wait a moment while published listings are being loaded.
states.errorText: The listings could not be loaded.
states.emptyText: Adjust your filters or reset them to see more properties.

map.title: Map overview
map.text: This page can later be connected to the professional MyHome24App map module so users can also explore listings directly on a map.
map.placeholderText: As soon as the central map system is connected, a professional map view for all public listings will appear here.
